scene.message: Enter the Tower of Nemesis?{nl} {ctl0e:0}{ret}
Kuroori: Owowowow, my arm's{nl} so heavy I can't lift it.{waitkey}Hehehee~...{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: Lots of paper here.{nl} Should we build a fire?{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Nothing but frozen{nl} books. A creepy room.{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: What? My scarf's{nl} crooked? Hm, my thanks.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: I'm looking into the{nl} play "The Snow Queen."{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: "The Tower of Nemesis"?{waitkey}Nemesis stands for revenge.{nl} An unpleasant feeling.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: "The Tower of Nemesis"?{waitkey}Nemesis stands for revenge.{nl} An unpleasant feeling.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: Did you hear what{nl} Kuroori said?{waitkey}Let's go at once!!{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: Quickly, let's go{nl} up to the next floor!{waitkey}{ret}
